headline: Southwest (LUV) Shares Up Since Jim Cramer Advised Selling The Stock
summary: Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE:LUV) is one of the 20 Stocks Jim Cramer Wanted You To Sell & Immediately Get Out Of. Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE:LUV) is one of the largest airlines in America.
